display() - Method in class AQueue

G

getElement() - Method in class Node
Returns the element value of this node.
getNext() - Method in class Node
Returns the next node object.
getPrev() - Method in class Node
Returns the previous node object.

H

head - Variable in class AQueue
The first node in the linked list queue.

N

Node<T> - Class in Unnamed Package
 
Node(T) - Constructor for class Node
Constructs a new node object with a given element.

P

pop() - Method in class AQueue
Remove the head node and return it to the user.
push(T) - Method in class AQueue
Add an element node to the back of the queue.

S

setElement(T) - Method in class Node
Sets the element value of this node.
setNext(Node<T>) - Method in class Node
Sets the node that comes after this one.
setPrev(Node<T>) - Method in class Node
Sets the node that comes before this one.

T

tail - Variable in class AQueue
The last node in the linked list queue.
